Event: Cornucopia Island October 2025
Event Date: 16/10/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: T148
Spiritual Pointer Totem

Once in a while, covers a random enemy unit in jelly for 4 sec. For 4 sec., the target can't attack or move, and takes 40% more damage for the duration. When the ability wears off, the jelly explodes and sticks to 2 nearby enemies for 4 sec. Their attack speed is reduced by 30%, and they have a 50% chance to miss their target when attacking.

For the duration of the battle, the unit makes all enemy units covered in jelly explode every second, dealing 200000 magic damage to these units and all enemy units in a small radius around them. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.

Requirements: 90

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Cornucopia Island October 2025

Sage bot code: T148

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 10 secs
